mood: Majestic, grounded, trustworthy, opulent. Blending Indian heritage with modern, world-class luxury real estate aesthetic.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-light leading-tight

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. py-24 to py-32 for sections. gap-12 for grids.
layout.grid_system: Bento grids with asymmetry. Avoid standard 3-column equal boxes. Use span-2 and span-1 variations.

motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for a premium feel.
motion.elements: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-ups. Subtle image scale on hover (scale-105 with duration-700 ease-out).
motion.hover: High-end luxury feel: slow transitions, slight brightness increase on text, slow image zoom in property cards.

components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism sticky header (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl). Logo left, links center, CTA right.
components.hero: Full-bleed background video or image. Black/40 to Black/70 gradient overlay. H1 left-aligned with overline.
components.buttons: Primary: Solid #C89B5F with black text. Secondary: Transparent with #2A2623 border and #F5F0EA text. Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) edges. NEVER pill-shaped.
components.cards: Property cards must be flat (no heavy shadows). 1px border (#2A2623). Image wrapper overflow-hidden. Text outside or cleanly overlaid at the bottom with a dark gradient.
components.forms: Inputs should have flat transparent backgrounds, border-b only or subtle #2A2623 full borders. Focus state #C89B5F.
components.icons: Use lucide-react with thin stroke widths. Keep them minimal.

hero.description: Elegant modern villa with scenic views, to be used for the Hero Section background.

featured_properties.description: Luxury Villa image for residential property card.
Sleek glass facade for commercial property card.
Misty valley at sunset for plots and land property card.
Modern house exterior glowing with lights.

testimonials.description: Confident woman in suit, for testimonial 2.

about.description: Nighttime blue body of water in front of a building, use as secondary visual in About/Story section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Cormorant Garamond' (serif) for headings and 'Outfit' (sans-serif) for body text. Add them to index.html from Google Fonts.
Use framer-motion to create an elegant, staggered reveal for property cards.
For the hero background image, use a gradient overlay 'bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/70 to-[#0A0908]' so the text is fully accessible.

Do NOT use standard card components from shadcn with heavy shadows or border radii. Use sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm) and thin 1px borders (#2A2623) to emulate an editorial, high-end feel.
Every interactive element MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'contact-submit-button', 'property-card-link').
Do NOT use the color teal or purple anywhere.
Structure the layout aggressively using the 'Bento Grid Protocol' (asymmetry, span-2 vs span-1) in the 'Why Choose Us' or 'Services' section.
For the 'Stats' section, use a 'Grid Borders' surface strategy (border-collapse look with 1px borders between items).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #F5F0EA text on #0A0908 meets APCA guidelines. Large text (#C89B5F) over dark backgrounds passes AA. Never use transparent headers without a scrim.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in Framer Motion configurations.
accessibility.interactive: Include explicit hover/focus states for all buttons and inputs. E.g., focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C89B5F].
